environment.uname: Linux c61d96076369 6.8.0-45-generic #45~22.04.1-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed Sep 11 15:25:05 UTC 2 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux

purpose: Embree vs OptiX/RT baseline across promoted benchmark apps before Triton/Numba partner work.

rows.notes: Embree same-front-door route over PIP, LSI, and overlay-seed. Primary metric is the summed backend workload elapsed time.

payload.next_stage: Run the same suite on an OptiX pod, then promote the highest-value path from compatibility evidence into reviewed performance evidence.
payload.paper: RayJoin: Fast and Precise Spatial Join, ICS 2024

lsi.dataset_note: Deterministic county-subset segment slice chosen to preserve CPU/Embree parity.
lsi.native_engine_boundary: The engine sees generic point, segment, polygon, traversal, and row contracts. RayJoin application policy, face metadata, PIP positive filtering, and overlay continuation stay in Python/partner code.

overlay_seed.dataset_note: County and soil subset chain-derived polygons for overlay seed generation.
overlay_seed.native_engine_boundary: The engine sees generic point, segment, polygon, traversal, and row contracts. RayJoin application policy, face metadata, PIP positive filtering, and overlay continuation stay in Python/partner code.

pip.dataset_note: County subset probe points against deterministic chain-derived polygons.
pip.native_engine_boundary: The engine sees generic point, segment, polygon, traversal, and row contracts. RayJoin application policy, face metadata, PIP positive filtering, and overlay continuation stay in Python/partner code.

rows.notes: Prepared OptiX route over PIP, LSI, and overlay-seed pair-dependency flags. The native engine sees generic point/closed-shape, segment-pair, and shape-pair prepared contracts; full polygon overlay materialization is outside this benchmark.

payload.next_stage: Run this route on an RTX pod against RayJoin-exported streams and compare phase boundaries to RayJoin query_exec. Full polygon materialization remains outside the overlay-seed benchmark contract.
payload.paper: RayJoin: Fast and Precise Spatial Join, ICS 2024

lsi.dataset_note: Deterministic county-subset segment slice chosen to preserve CPU/Embree parity.
lsi.device_resident_continuation_status: not_complete: prepared query can avoid Python row materialization for counts, but generic downstream row-stream continuation still needs pod/native work
lsi.native_engine_boundary: The engine sees generic prepared point/closed-shape, segment-pair, or shape-pair contracts. RayJoin application policy and paper-specific interpretation stay in Python.

overlay_seed.dataset_note: County and soil subset chain-derived polygons for overlay seed generation.
overlay_seed.native_engine_boundary: The engine sees generic prepared point/closed-shape, segment-pair, or shape-pair contracts. RayJoin application policy and paper-specific interpretation stay in Python.

pip.dataset_note: County subset probe points against deterministic chain-derived polygons.
pip.device_resident_continuation_status: not_complete: prepared query can avoid Python row materialization for counts, but generic downstream row-stream continuation still needs pod/native work
pip.native_engine_boundary: The engine sees generic prepared point/closed-shape, segment-pair, or shape-pair contracts. RayJoin application policy and paper-specific interpretation stay in Python.
